title: quararibea alchornifolia
intro: Quararibea alchornifolia, also known as the Quenepa, is a tropical evergreen tree native to the Caribbean and Central America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Quararibea alchornifolia include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory problems, and supporting the immune system. Quararibea alchornifolia can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used in traditional medicine.
